doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No verifiable EAJP-2025 protocol exists in State Bar of California records, and the document's claim that paralegal activities are exempted from B&P §6125 without pre-filing attorney review contradicts established California unauthorized pr
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such "EAJP-2025" protocol exists in verifiable State Bar of California or Legal Services Trust Fund Commission records, and the document's core provision—exempting paralegal assistance from B&P §6125 UPL liability without pre-filing attorney review—contradicts California's established unauthorized practice framework, which cannot be waived by a Bar commission protocol alone.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No verifiable EAJP-2025 protocol exists in State Bar of California records, and the document's claim that paralegal activities are exempted from B&P §6125 without pre-filing attorney review contradicts established California unauthorized practice law.
